mapper.select: select distinct m.permission from yx_menu m left join yx_role_menu rm on m.id = rm.menu_id left join yx_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join yx_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where m.status = 1 and r.status = 1 and ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.is_deleted = false and r.is_deleted = false

select distinct m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.visible, m.status, coalesce(m.permission, '') as permission, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.created_at from yx_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = 1 and m.is_deleted = false order by m.parent_id, m.sort_order

select distinct m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.visible, m.status, coalesce(m.permission, '') as permission, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.created_at from yx_menu m left join yx_role_menu rm on m.id = rm.menu_id left join yx_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join yx_role r on r.id = ur.role_id left join yx_user u on u.id = ur.user_id where u.id = #{userId} and m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = 1 and r.status = 1 and m.is_deleted = false and r.is_deleted = false and u.is_deleted = false order by m.parent_id, m.sort_order
